title: Crumbling Codex
author: Krümblegård
pages:
§6§lWayfall

§7A tear in reality.

§aWayfall§7 is a shattered void of
floating islands, living stone,
and reactive terrain.

§7Progress here leads to §5Runic craft§7…
and something far worse.

§6§lEntering Wayfall

§7• §aWaystone§7 (rare first-use pull)
§7• §aWayfall Portal§7 (Creative)

§8────────────

§7You will always land safely
on a spawn island.

§8Hold §lShift§r§8 to resist a Waystone pull.

§6§lFirst Steps

§7• Gather §aFault Dust
§7• Harvest §aRunegrowth
§7• Cut §aWayfall wood
§7• Farm §aPaleweft Corn§7 → §aWeftkern

§8Dormant stone may be §5Traprock§8.

§6§lFood & Survival

§aPaleweft§7 grows across Wayfall.

§7Secure a steady §aWeftkern§7 supply
before pushing deeper.

§8If you can farm,
you can survive.

§6§lMobility

§aScaralon Beetles§7 can be tamed
and ridden.

§7• Ground sprint
§7• Powered flight
§7• Egg laying

§l§7Elytra are renewable here.§r

§5§lRunic Path

§7Runic Debris
§8↓
§7Smelt → Runic Scrap
§8↓
§74× Scrap + 4× Copper
§8↓
§7Runic Ingot
§8↓
§7Netherite + Runic
§8↓
§5Attuned Ingot

§5§lThe Warning

§7Something rules Wayfall.

§7It has phases.

§7It remembers you.
